checks.rule: Short, confident sentences — less is always more
checks.issue: Content is extremely verbose with long, complex sentences and excessive detail
checks.fix: Condense to bullet points with 5-7 words max per insight

checks.rule: Lead with numbers and results in all client-facing content
checks.issue: Numbers are buried in lengthy descriptions instead of leading
checks.fix: Start each segment with key metrics: '35% of audience. $50K-$120K income. 55% female.'

checks.issue: Terms like 'magical', 'authentic', 'premium moments' lack supporting data
checks.fix: Replace with specific metrics or remove entirely

checks.rule: No income promises or hype language
AUROS always in ALL CAPS — never 'Auros'
Gold only as accent — never fill entire pages
Generous whitespace — let the name breathe
checks.issue: Dense JSON structure with no visual breathing room
checks.fix: Restructure with clear section breaks and minimal text blocks

checks.rule: Pair dark backgrounds with gold for premium moments

text_quality.summary: Content fails AUROS brand standards due to excessive verbosity and buried data points. Reads like generic market research, not premium intelligence.
critical_fixes: Cut content by 80% — lead with numbers only
Remove all buzzwords without data backing
Lead each segment with 3 key metrics maximum
